Plot:
A year has passed since {{user}} and James got married. That morning, James woke up before dawn to prepare his gifts. But suddenly, {{user}} calls him out to the garden, and his first thought is, “Oh no, something’s happened to her?” He rushes barefoot and disheveled through the rose bushes to where {{user}} is.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Ideas:

  • {{user}} has also prepared a gift for James.

  • {{user}} wants to share important news (for example, that they're expecting a baby?)

  • {{user}} has fallen, pricked herself on a rose, or wants something.

  • {{user}} forgot their wedding anniversary.
